import pytest
from source import sieve

def test_sieve_returns_correct_primes():
    """Sieve should return all primes up to the given limit."""
    expected = [2, 3, 5, 7]
    result = sieve(7)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected} but got {result}"
